---
title: "Ben Dêivide"
image: "avatar.png"
links:
  - label: Lattes
    url: http://lattes.cnpq.br/4118572120481367
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:name@gmail.com"
  - label: Relatórios
    url: "./relatorio/index.html"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
Texto ....
